section.heading: Treatment of certain benefits and costs

content.p: In the case of a flood risk management or coastal storm risk management project in a region of moderate or high seismic hazard, for the purpose of a benefit-cost analysis for the project, the Secretary shall not include in that analysis any additional design and construction costs resulting from addressing seismic concerns.

subsection.heading: Savings provision
subsection.chapeau: Except with respect to the benefit-cost analysis, the additional costs referred to in subsection (a) shall be—

paragraph.content: included in the total project cost; and
subject to cost-share requirements otherwise applicable to the project.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was enacted as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 2020, and not as part of the Water Resources Development Act of 1986 which comprises this chapter.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2022—Subsec. (a). Pub. L. 117–263 substituted “a flood risk management or coastal storm risk management project in a region” for “flood risk management project that incidentally generates seismic safety benefits in regions”.

note.heading: “Secretary” Defined
note.p: Secretary means the Secretary of the Army, see section 2 of div. AA of Pub. L. 116–260, set out as a note under section 2201 of this title.
